citations.description: Ticket 49ae-258b-4534-4d83 comment by Joe Oakhart: 'Not self-attesting an operator soak sign-off; closing as superseded.' No soak window, no measured outcome, no specific reference id or date is recorded.
Ticket 4cdf-e52c-e68e-4f7d (the superseding story) comments contain only a FORCE_CLAIM note; no operator-attested soak attestation with soak window or field evidence is recorded there either.

findings.criterion: [operator-attested] a soak period with the floors default-ON has elapsed with no must-suppress (gold-set) regression reported; the attestation names the soak window and evidence.
findings.detail: No attestation in this ticket names a concrete soak window, evidence, or any verifiable specific (a reference id/URL, a measured outcome, a timestamp). The ticket comment explicitly states 'Not self-attesting an operator soak sign-off; closing as superseded.' The related superseding ticket (4cdf-e52c-e68e-4f7d) likewise contains no operator-attested soak attestation in its comments. For an operator-attested criterion, a concrete attestation naming ≥1 verifiable specific is required — none was found.
findings.remediation: Record a concrete operator attestation as a ticket comment that names: (1) the soak start/end dates (e.g., 'default-ON soak from 2026-07-11 to 2026-07-18'), (2) the evidence (e.g., 'N dogfood rounds, zero gold-set suppression incidents'), and (3) a verifiable reference (e.g., a commit/deploy id or run log URL). The comment must appear on this ticket (or be cross-referenced explicitly) with enough specifics to independently verify the claim.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
